svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/27.0.5 Chrome/134.0.6998.205 Electron/35.3.0 Safari/537.36" scale="1" border="0" version="27.0.5"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="Lm1qKD5lFUT4U7yspdq1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1426" dy="849" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-1" value="DUT MEASUREMENTS
(n = 5 samples)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="10" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-2" value="MEAN CALCULATION
M_DUT (average)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="110" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-3" value="REFERENCE STANDARD
M_REF" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="210" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-4" value="CALIBRATION CERTIFICATE
Uncertainty U" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="10" y="311" width="170" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-5" value="DEVIATION CALCULATION
Δ = M_REF - M_DUT" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="210" width="160" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-6" value="TOLERANCE MODEL
T = M_REF · k · 0.01" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="310" width="150" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-7" value="DECISION FUNCTION
|Δ| + U ≤ T ?" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="310" width="140" height="61" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-8" value="PASS / FAIL 
Result" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="230" y="410" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-9" value="" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" value="M_DUT[i]" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" parent="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-9" vertex="1" connectable="0"> <mxGeometry x="-0.3105" y="1" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="7" y="1" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xo1CgYa1Z0frJUvAXTeN-10" value=""
